blended.narrative: Sugarloaf is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,998 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: flurries, highs of 43°F, gusts to 41 mph.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
